creator: beat.siegenthaler@beatsnet.com
text:
FreeBSD install seem not be possible in any way on this hardware.
I tried several ways to install 7.3|8.1 memstick|cd|dvd amd64|i386

Symptom:
"Turning ASCII wheel" is viewable for a few seconds, then the Server reboots immediately. 

Can only boot Linux for providing system info (Fedora13/64bit)
